title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Flipkart Capital India are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Flipkart Capital India:
Flipkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Capital India!
